detectors.description:
LilDoge._getTValues(uint256) (LilDoge.sol#1319-1327) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:

[LilDoge._getTValues(uint256)](LilDoge.sol#L1319-L1327) performs a multiplication on the result of a division:

detectors.description:
LilDoge.allowance(address,address).owner (LilDoge.sol#987) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (LilDoge.sol#785-789) (function)

LilDoge._approve(address,address,uint256).owner (LilDoge.sol#1167) shadows:
	- Ownable.owner() (LilDoge.sol#785-789) (function)

LilDoge.setMaxTxPercent(uint256) (LilDoge.sol#1059-1067) should emit an event for: 
	- _maxTxAmount = _tTotal.mul(maxTxPercent).div(10 ** 2) (LilDoge.sol#1061-1065)

LilDoge.transferFrom(address,address,uint256).recipient (LilDoge.sol#1005) lacks a zero-check on :
		- newn = recipient (LilDoge.sol#1007)

Address._functionCallWithValue(address,bytes,uint256,string) (LilDoge.sol#703-745) uses assembly
	- INLINE ASM (LilDoge.sol#729-735)

Address.isContract(address) (LilDoge.sol#517-535) uses assembly
	- INLINE ASM (LilDoge.sol#531)

LilDoge.includeAccount(address) (LilDoge.sol#1141-1163) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- _excluded.pop() (LilDoge.sol#1155)
detectors.markdown:
[LilDoge.includeAccount(address)](LilDoge.sol#L1141-L1163) has costly operations inside a loop:
	- [_excluded.pop()](LilDoge.sol#L1155)

detectors.description:
Version constraint ^0.6.12 contains known severe issues (https://solidity.readthedocs.io/en/latest/bugs.html)
	- FullInlinerNonExpressionSplitArgumentEvaluationOrder
	- MissingSideEffectsOnSelectorAccess
	- AbiReencodingHeadOverflowWithStaticArrayCleanup
	- DirtyBytesArrayToStorage
	- DataLocationChangeInInternalOverride
	- NestedCalldataArrayAbiReencodingSizeValidation
	- SignedImmutables
	- ABIDecodeTwoDimensionalArrayMemory
	- KeccakCaching
	- EmptyByteArrayCopy
	- DynamicArrayCleanup.
It is used by:
	- ^0.6.12 (LilDoge.sol#27)
